summary: A clip from a cable-news program shown as a split screen. On the left an anchor in a dark suit sits at a city-skyline desk; on the right a bearded man in a dark suit speaks via remote, seated in front of an American flag and a Department of Homeland Security backdrop. A lower-third chyron reads 'DHS SECRETARY MULLIN JOINS ROB SCHMITT TONIGHT', and a later frame names him 'SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN, SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY'.

script.scene: Split screen: an anchor at left, a remote guest at right before a flag and DHS backdrop; chyron 'DHS SECRETARY MULLIN JOINS ROB SCHMITT TONIGHT'.
Full frame on the remote guest speaking; lower-third 'SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN, SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY'.

notable_text: ROB SCHMITT TONIGHT; DHS SECRETARY MULLIN; SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY
